compiled_state.title: test-ci-llm-review-runner: large single-commit test additions reduce reviewability
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The diff adds 662 lines to tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh in a single commit (tests 13-20). While tests are correct, future test stories should split deep-tier and overlay tests into separate commits for easier review.
File: tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh
Category: maintainability

comments.body: Investigated (debug-everything 2026-04-28): This is a process recommendation, not a code bug — no fix available. The finding is that future test stories should split large test additions into smaller commits for reviewability. Adding process note and leaving open for user to decide disposition.
comments.author: Test
